title: chionanthus axilliflorus subsp. moncadae
intro: Chionanthus axilliflorus subsp. moncadae, also known as Moncada's Fringe Tree, is a plant species within the Chionanthus genus. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Chionanthus axilliflorus subsp. moncadae include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits such as relieving coughs and colds, as well as supporting immune function.
